title: Factory Constructors
description: Implement a factory constructor to create a User from a map of data.
problemStatement:
Flutter apps often receive data as JSON (Maps). Add a `factory` constructor `User.fromMap(Map<String, String> data)` to your `User` class that creates a user from keys `'username'` and `'email'`. 

**Requirement:** Test it using `{'username': 'Bob', 'email': 'bob@dev.io'}`.
hints: A factory constructor can use logic before deciding which instance to return.
